hypothesis:
## Novel Hypothesis

Multimodal pre-training of domain-specific vision-language models on chemical structure segmentation and contextual entity linking will achieve >0.80 F1 score on SMILES extraction from heterogeneous scientific figures when combined with document layout analysis, surpassing current general-purpose LLM and single-agent approaches that fail to extract molecular structures (F1 ≈ 0.00–0.06).
